creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: miwi
Date: Tue Feb 12 11:12:22 2013
New Revision: 312096
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312096

Log:
  - Update to 1.2.23
  
  PR:		176028
  Submitted by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/www/punbb/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/punbb/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/punbb/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/www/punbb/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/punbb/Makefile	Tue Feb 12 10:46:41 2013	(r312095)
+++ head/www/punbb/Makefile	Tue Feb 12 11:12:22 2013	(r312096)
@@ -1,12 +1,8 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:	punbb
-# Date created:		2006-08-05
-# Whom:			Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
-#
+# Created by: Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	punbb
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.22
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.23
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://punbb.informer.com/download/ \
 		http://punbb.informer.com/download/plugins/:plugins \
@@ -115,7 +111,7 @@ do-install:
 	@cd ${WRKSRC}/upload && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} . ${WWWDIR}
 
 .for i in ${LANGFILES}
-	${UNZIP_CMD} -o ${DISTDIR}/${i} -d ${WWWDIR}/lang
+	${UNZIP_CMD} -o ${DISTDIR}/${i} -d ${WWWDIR}/lang -x '*/.DS_Store' -x '*/._.DS_Store'
 .endfor
 
 .for i in ${PLUGINS}
